name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum governing the use of artificial intelligence services between a Provider and Customer, covering input/output ownership, model training restrictions, and AI-specific disclaimers.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement establishing terms under which a Provider handles Protected Health Information (PHI) on behalf of a Company, including safeguards, breach notification, and subprocessor requirements.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement for cloud-based software-as-a-service subscriptions, covering access rights, usage restrictions, payment terms, auto-renewal, liability caps, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement granting early product access to a design partner in exchange for structured feedback and participation in the product development program.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR-compliant agreement defining the roles and obligations of a data processor and controller, including subprocessor management, international transfer mechanisms (SCCs), and breach notification timelines.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard mutual NDA template protecting confidential information shared between two parties evaluating a potential business relationship, with configurable duration and governing law.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Customizable cover page for the Mutual NDA, specifying party details, effective date, agreement purpose, confidentiality period, and governing jurisdiction.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Agreement establishing a formal partnership between two companies, covering mutual obligations, fees, trademark licensing, dispute resolution, confidentiality, and termination terms.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term agreement for product evaluation before a longer-term commitment, covering access rights, usage restrictions, feedback collection, data handling, and termination conditions.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Agreement for the delivery of professional services via Statements of Work (SOWs), covering deliverable ownership, payment terms, change orders, indemnification, and liability.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Addendum defining uptime commitments and support response time targets for cloud services, including service credit calculations, exclusions, and termination rights for persistent failures.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement granting a limited, non-exclusive license to use software during a subscription period, covering usage restrictions, payment, warranties, liability caps, and data usage for ML.
